patterns.signature: container rss <N>Gi, memory request 0 / no memory limit set
pod olapdb-vw-write-0 evicted: The node was low on resource: memory
write query failed: no available write worker

note: platform-api has the HIGHEST count (3300) and PAGED. But the EARLIEST signals are olapdb-vw-write's memory growth (11:48:20) and the node MemoryPressure=True at 11:50:00, BEFORE olapdb-server's query failures (11:52:10) and platform-api's 5xx (11:55:10). The node memory-pressure / pod eviction is the origin; the query failures are downstream.
